# Strength Plateau (fixture)

> Synthetic fixture used by health-archive ingestion + NotesReader tests.
> Content is illustrative and not tied to a real person.

## Summary

Across multiple training cycles, this person's pull-up max-rep test has stalled
in the 5–7 range despite consistent execution of programs that didn't include
direct pull-up volume. Documented in 2022, 2023, and 2024 retros.

## Observations

- Programs followed: linear strength block, hypertrophy block, conditioning block
- Pull-up volume in those programs: zero or near-zero
- Max-rep tests: 5, 6, 7, 6, 7 (over 24 months)
- No injury or recovery confound

## Hypothesis

Frequency-driven. The athlete responds to repeated low-volume exposure (e.g.,
"daily pull-ups, 5 reps unbroken") more than to programmed weekly sessions.

## Action items

- Add a daily strength micro-protocol entry to the coaching compliance fields
- Track multi-month trend; reassess at 90 days

## Reference periods

- 2024-Q2: pull-up max stuck at 6
- 2024-Q4: pull-up max 7 after 8 weeks of daily 5-rep practice
